# Silicon Strides (硅步千里)
> A comprehensive, full-stack computer science knowledge base structured around 8 philosophical volumes.
> From a grain of silicon sand to the digital universe.

## Project Info
- **Author**: Zhang Yongzhu
- **Repo**: https://github.com/yadayanxue/silicon-strides
- **Tech Stack**: Astro + Starlight, Mermaid.js, KaTeX, Pagefind

## Agent Files — Read First
- **[AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)**: Writing constitution (role, standards, formatting, forbidden actions, quick start)
- **[PROGRESS.md](PROGRESS.md)**: Progress tracker with 49-chapter table, Phase roadmap, completion checklist

## Docs Structure (60 files total)

### Core Pages
- [Home](src/content/docs/index.md): Landing page with card-grid navigation.
- [Glossary](src/content/docs/glossary.md): 48 CS terms, A–Z sections.

### Scroll 0 · Lingxi (灵犀) — Theory & Algorithms (7 files)
- [Index](src/content/docs/00-lingxi/index.md)
- [01 数学基础](src/content/docs/00-lingxi/01-mathematical-foundations.md)
- [02 形式逻辑](src/content/docs/00-lingxi/02-formal-logic.md)
- [03 计算理论](src/content/docs/00-lingxi/03-theory-of-computation.md)
- [04 算法理论](src/content/docs/00-lingxi/04-algorithm-theory.md)
- [05 编译原理](src/content/docs/00-lingxi/05-compiler-theory.md)
- [06 密码学数学](src/content/docs/00-lingxi/06-cryptographic-mathematics.md)

- [05 低功耗设计](src/content/docs/02-jiezi/05-low-power-design.md)

- [05 工程文化](src/content/docs/08-qianli/05-engineering-culture.md)

## Conventions
- YAML frontmatter: `title` (required), `tags` (required), `draft` (hides page from production)
- Cross-volume links: absolute paths from site root (e.g., `[MMU](/01-weichen/04-memory-hierarchy/)`)
- Glossary links: `[术语](/glossary/#字母段)` — anchor matches the letter heading
- Mermaid diagrams: require `title` attribute; loaded from npm package `mermaid`
- Math: inline `$...$`, block `$$...$$` via KaTeX (`remark-math` + `rehype-katex`)
- Admonitions: `:::tip[标题]`, `:::note[标题]`, `:::caution[标题]`, `:::danger[标题]`
- Build: `npm run build` (generates `dist/` with Pagefind search index)
